message:
🐛 Fix benchmark cards showing demo data — remove 30d default filter (#938)

The default `since=30d` filter was excluding all Google Drive benchmark
data (created October 2025). Changed default to `0` (no filter) on both
backend endpoints and frontend SSE hook so all benchmark reports load.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
